criteria.description: All four built-in mission types — including documentation/research/plan — are creatable end-to-end (mission create succeeds; /plan-setup resolves), closing the #2689 regression.
criteria.evidence: WP02/03/04 authored per-type template refs (artifact_key spec/plan) + content; red-first proofs: documentation create produces a 7306-byte spec.md, research create succeeds end-to-end, plan create + /plan-setup both resolve. project_template_set now non-null for all 4 types.
criteria.notes: documentation/research promoted from guidelines.md; plan author-fresh (no guidelines source). Genuine per-type content confirmed by reviewer reading all 16 prompts.

criteria.description: Zero persisted/authorable MissionType.template_set field references remain; a mission_types/*.yaml authoring template_set: fails loudly.
criteria.evidence: WP01 removed the field (models.py) + the raw-YAML overlay; grep confirms no surviving model-field read. Pack-fails-loud regression test proves an authored template_set: raises ValidationError (extra=forbid). Commit ff7d410bd.
criteria.notes: Behavior-preserving cutover: software-dev filename + canonical --json order parity green (TestSoftwareDevProjectionParity retained).

criteria.description: The 16 seeded-blank step prompts all carry genuine per-type content; the emptiness scaffold is retired and replaced by a positive assertion.
criteria.evidence: WP05 retired _SEEDED_BLANK_STEPS scaffold → positive structural floor over all 21 sequence-step prompts (non-empty + no TODO/PLACEHOLDER/FIXME + $ARGUMENTS + heading + min-len), anti-vacuity-guarded. Substance is a reviewer gate (NFR-004 hook present). 483 passed.
criteria.notes: Machine floor necessary-not-sufficient; genuine substance verified per-type in WP02/03/04 review.

criteria.description: The mission_type -> step -> template chain is graph-backed; every authored template resolves by name and by URN; DRG freshness green with the asserted +N/+N delta and orphans=10.
criteria.evidence: WP06 added extract_template_instantiation_edges (consumes WP01 iter_template_refs, single traversal); N=8 -> 288 nodes / 765 edges / 10 orphans, byte-identical fresh; positive instantiates assertion; 16 bare exemplars untouched. WP07 added the resolve-by-URN lane with by-URN==by-name + override-wins tests. Commits cb3242daa, 307dcd1db/58422cbb5.
criteria.notes: Orphans genuinely 10 (recomputed from shipped graph). Resolves #883, delivers the deferred mission_type->template edge class.

criteria.description: software-dev behavior is unchanged (byte-for-byte template-resolution + --json parity).
criteria.evidence: WP01 T007 parity proofs green; TestSoftwareDevProjectionParity retained; --json template_set key order canonicalizes to sequence_index order (deterministic, CLI-test baseline updated). Repo constructs + projects {spec,plan} identically.
criteria.notes: Proven behavior-preserving byte-for-byte; the cutover changed the projection's SOURCE (field -> steps), not its values.

criteria.description: Intentional, computable DRG delta: +N nodes/edges (N=8), orphans stay 10, every arch marker re-baselined, freshness green.
criteria.evidence: WP06: _EXPECTED_NODE_COUNT 280->288, _EXPECTED_EDGE_COUNT 757->765, orphans=10; orphan-residual ceiling 14 unchanged; template cardinality golden-count unchanged; _ARCH_SHARD_N_FILES not tripped; regenerate-graph --check fresh; tests/architectural 1021 passed.
criteria.notes: N computed post-authoring (never pinned upfront): software-dev 2 + documentation 2 + research 2 + plan 2.

criteria.description: The step-projection consumption seam performs exactly one mission-steps/ resolution per (mission_type, pack_context) (shared cache).
criteria.evidence: WP01: module-level functools.cache on resolve_all_for_mission_type keyed (builtin_root, mission_type, pack_context), shared across both consumers + .cache_clear() seam; one-walk spy test proves cross-instance single walk.
criteria.notes: Cache is on the filesystem-walk function, not slot-local, not merely default().

criteria.description: Cross-type template_file uniqueness guard: no two mission types project the same template_file.
criteria.evidence: WP05 added tests/doctrine/missions/test_template_file_uniqueness.py iterating the 4 types' project_template_set with anti-vacuity guard; per-type filenames verified distinct.
criteria.notes: Prevents the plan/software-dev name-collision contaminating a filename.

criteria.description: Name<->URN compatibility contract: resolve-by-name and resolve-by-URN are two lanes; the 5-tier override chain works for both; creation path untouched.
criteria.evidence: WP07: resolve_template_by_urn added alongside resolve_configured_template (signature unchanged, name path untouched); by-URN==by-name equivalence + .kittify override-wins on the URN lane both proven; both converge on Stage-2 resolve_template. C-002 scalar-fence arch test green.
criteria.notes: URN lane's production consumer (charter context --include template:) tracked in follow-up #2761; symbols allowlisted (designed-ahead public API).
